hero.text: Your only limit is your mind.
hero.author: Unknown

aries.general: Today is a day for action, Aries. Channel your energy into something meaningful.
aries.love: Communication is key in your relationships today. Speak from the heart.
aries.career: A new opportunity may present itself at work. Be ready to seize it.

taurus.general: Stability and comfort are important for you today. Seek out what brings you peace.
taurus.love: Romance may blossom unexpectedly. Keep your eyes open for a surprise.
taurus.career: Your persistence pays off. Today could lead to a significant breakthrough.

gemini.general: Your curiosity is piqued, Gemini. Embrace new ideas and connections.
gemini.love: A lively conversation could spark romance today. Don't shy away.
gemini.career: Networking could provide valuable opportunities. Reach out to others.

cancer.general: Emotional insights will guide you today. Trust your instincts.
cancer.love: Foster your emotional connections. A heartfelt gesture goes a long way.
cancer.career: Collaboration with colleagues can bear fruit. Foster teamwork.

leo.general: Creative energy flourishes today. Don't hesitate to express yourself.
leo.love: Passion is high. A little spontaneity could ignite a spark.
leo.career: Let your leadership qualities shine at work. You'll inspire others.

virgo.general: Focus on organization and details today. A methodical approach will yield results.
virgo.love: Nurturing your partner's needs will strengthen your bond.
virgo.career: Analytical skills are your asset. Use them to solve work challenges.

libra.general: Balance is essential today. Harmonize aspects of your life for well-being.
libra.love: Romantic gestures may be reciprocated. Put effort into relationships.
libra.career: Seek consensus in teamwork. Your diplomatic skills shine.

scorpio.general: Intensity marks your day. Dive deep into projects that inspire you.
scorpio.love: Trust and intimacy deepen in relationships. Be open and vulnerable.
scorpio.career: Your determination can overcome any hurdle today. Stay focused.

sagittarius.general: Adventures await you today. Seek opportunities for growth.
sagittarius.love: Explore new experiences with your partner. Excitement is in the air.
sagittarius.career: A new project may resonate with your vision. Embrace it.

capricorn.general: Structure and discipline will serve you well today. Stick to your plans.
capricorn.love: Show your affection through acts of service. Actions speak louder.
capricorn.career: Recognition for your hard work may come your way. Stay humble.

aquarius.general: Innovation and originality define your day. Embrace your unique perspective.
aquarius.love: A chance encounter may spark a meaningful connection.
aquarius.career: Utilize your visionary skills to propose new ideas at work.

pisces.general: Your intuition is amplified today. Trust your gut feelings.
pisces.love: Artistic expression can enhance your relationship. Create together.
pisces.career: Your empathy can help resolve conflict among coworkers.

professional.text: Success usually comes to those who are too busy to be looking for it.
professional.author: Henry David Thoreau

professional.text: Don't watch the clock; do what it does. Keep going.
professional.author: Sam Levenson

professional.text: The future depends on what you do today.
professional.author: Mahatma Gandhi

professional.text: Opportunities don't happen. You create them.
professional.author: Chris Grosser

professional.text: I find that the harder I work, the more luck I seem to have.
professional.author: Thomas Jefferson

professional.text: Success is not the key to happiness. Happiness is the key to success.
professional.author: Albert Schweitzer

motivation.text: Don't be pushed around by the fears in your mind. Be led by the dreams in your heart.
motivation.author: Roy T. Bennett

motivation.text: The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
motivation.author: Steve Jobs

motivation.text: You are never too old to set another goal or to dream a new dream.
motivation.author: C.S. Lewis

motivation.text: It does not matter how slowly you go as long as you do not stop.
motivation.author: Confucius

motivation.text: Act as if what you do makes a difference. It does.
motivation.author: William James

motivation.text: Believe you can and you're halfway there.
motivation.author: Theodore Roosevelt

captions.text: Every day is a new beginning.
captions.author: Unknown

captions.text: You are stronger than you think.
captions.author: Unknown

captions.text: Do not wait to strike till the iron is hot, but make it hot by striking.
captions.author: William Butler Yeats

captions.text: Live life to the fullest and focus on the positives.
captions.author: Unknown

captions.text: Work hard in silence, let your success be your noise.
captions.author: Frank Ocean

captions.text: Dream big and dare to fail.
captions.author: Norman Vaughan

tech.text: Technology is best when it brings people together.
tech.author: Matt Mullenweg

tech.text: The science of today is the technology of tomorrow.
tech.author: Edward Teller

tech.text: Innovation distinguishes between a leader and a follower.
tech.author: Steve Jobs

tech.text: The only limit to our realization of tomorrow will be our doubts of today.
tech.author: Franklin D. Roosevelt

tech.text: The great growling engine of change - technology.
tech.author: Alvin Toffler

tech.text: Technology, like art, is a soaring exercise of the human imagination.
tech.author: Daniel Bell

fun.text: Laughter is timeless. Imagination has no age. And dreams are forever.
fun.author: Walt Disney

fun.text: Life is either a daring adventure or nothing at all.
fun.author: Helen Keller

fun.text: You can’t put a limit on anything. The more you dream, the farther you get.
fun.author: Michael Phelps

fun.text: A day without laughter is a day wasted.
fun.author: Charlie Chaplin

fun.text: In the end, we only regret the chances we didn't take.
fun.author: Lewis Carroll

fun.text: If you can't beat them, arrange to have them beaten.
fun.author: George Carlin

faith.text: Faith is taking the first step even when you don't see the whole staircase.
faith.author: Martin Luther King Jr.

faith.text: Faith is the bridge between where I am and where I want to be.
faith.author: Unknown

faith.text: Everything is possible for one who believes.
faith.author: Mark 9:23

faith.text: Faith is not the absence of doubt, but the courage to continue.
faith.author: Unknown

faith.text: Let your faith be bigger than your fear.
faith.author: Unknown

faith.text: When you have faith, you live in the light.
faith.author: Unknown

wisdom.text: The only true wisdom is in knowing you know nothing.
wisdom.author: Socrates

wisdom.text: Do not dwell in the past, do not dream of the future, concentrate the mind on the present moment.
wisdom.author: Buddha

wisdom.text: Wisdom is the reward you get for a lifetime of listening when you would have preferred to talk.
wisdom.author: Mark Twain

wisdom.text: The wise man does not lay up his own treasures. The more he gives to others, the more he has for himself.
wisdom.author: Lao Tzu

wisdom.text: Knowing yourself is the beginning of all wisdom.
wisdom.author: Aristotle

wisdom.text: Do not seek to follow in the footsteps of the wise; seek what they sought.
wisdom.author: Matsuo Basho
